title: Windows Pass-the-Hash Attack Indicators
description: Detects command-line patterns associated with pass-the-hash attacks using tools like Impacket, CrackMapExec, or built-in Windows commands with NTLM hash parameters.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*sekurlsa::pth*' or 'Command Line' like '*Invoke-SMBExec*' or 'Command Line' like '*Invoke-WMIExec*' or 'Command Line' like '*crackmapexec*' or 'Command Line' like '*smbexec*' or 'Command Line' like '*wmiexec*' or 'Command Line' like '*atexec*')) or ('Process Name' like '*runas.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*/netonly*'))
falsepositives: Legitimate use of runas /netonly for cross-domain authentication
